mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workspace (workspace_name, workspace_code, owner_user_id, plan_type, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{workspaceName}, #{workspaceCode}, #{ownerUserId}, #{planType}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM workspace WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM workspace WHERE workspace_code = #{workspaceCode} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT w.* FROM workspace w INNER JOIN workspace_user wu ON wu.workspace_id = w.id WHERE wu.user_id = #{userId} AND w.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY w.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE workspace SET is_deleted = 1, status = 0, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
